01_initial_request.input_data: Breast cancer cell lines and TCGA database clinical data
01_initial_request.user_intent: To elucidate the detailed mechanism and role of USP41 in breast cancer, specifically its regulation of EMT and cell migration via Snail stabilization
01_initial_request.quantifiable_goal: Snail protein stabilization levels and breast cancer cell migration and growth rates

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] USP41 expression and prognosis in breast cancer are not fully elucidated. [Gap] Lack of clinical data correlation between USP41 levels and patient survival. [Decision] To achieve clinical relevance assessment, chose to use Xena browser to perform TCGA database analysis on breast carcinoma, expecting to obtain USP41 mRNA expression and survival rate data.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: USP41 mRNA expression was higher in luminal B, HER2+, and TN breast cancer cells compared to normal. Tumor tissues overexpressed USP41 and had shorter survival time.

references.citation: Li, H., et al. Cancer Biomark. 2021
references.relevance: Supports the use of TCGA database for mRNA characterization and survival prediction in invasive breast cancer.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] USP41 role in cell migration and proliferation needs experimental validation. [Gap] Functional effect of USP41 depletion in breast cancer cell lines is unknown. [Decision] To achieve functional characterization, chose to use Lipofectamine RNAiMAX Reagent to perform siRNA transfection on MDA-MB-231 and MDA-MB-361 cells, expecting to obtain USP41 knockdown cells.

parameters.siRNA_sequences: 5'-GGA AGA AGA CCC GUG GGA A-3' and 5'-CCU GCU GCC UUA ACU CCU U-3'

02_agent_trajectory.observation: USP41 protein level was downregulated confirmed by Western blotting.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] USP41 knockdown cells are generated. [Gap] Effect on cell migration capability is unmeasured. [Decision] To achieve migration assessment, chose to use wound healing assay to perform scratch test on transfected cells, expecting to obtain wound closure rates.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Knockdown of USP41 suppressed wound healing activity and migration in two breast cancer cells.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Wound healing assay indicates migration suppression. [Gap] Confirmation using a different migration method is needed. [Decision] To achieve robust migration validation, chose to use transwell assay to perform invasion test on transfected cells, expecting to obtain migrated cell counts.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Migration ability was decreased in USP41 knockdown cells.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Migration is inhibited by USP41 knockdown. [Gap] Effect on cell proliferation is unmeasured. [Decision] To achieve proliferation assessment, chose to use colony formation assay to perform long-term growth test on transfected cells, expecting to obtain colony numbers.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: USP41 downregulation led to decreased colony forming ability.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Colony formation indicates proliferation inhibition. [Gap] Direct cell growth quantification is needed. [Decision] To achieve growth rate quantification, chose to use cell counting to perform direct cell number measurement on transfected cells, expecting to obtain cell growth curves.

parameters.method: Trypan blue exclusion (implied by cell counting context)

02_agent_trajectory.observation: USP41 downregulation led to decreased cell growth.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Knockdown shows USP41 promotes growth/migration. [Gap] Effect of overexpression needs verification. [Decision] To achieve overexpression validation, chose to use Lipidofect-P to perform plasmid transfection on breast cancer cells, expecting to obtain USP41 overexpressing cells.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: USP41 transfected cells showed high level of USP41 protein.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Overexpression cells are generated. [Gap] Effect on migration needs assessment. [Decision] To achieve migration assessment, chose to use wound healing assay to perform scratch test on overexpressing cells, expecting to obtain wound closure rates.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Overexpression of USP41 increased cell migration.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Wound healing shows increased migration. [Gap] Invasion capability needs confirmation. [Decision] To achieve invasion assessment, chose to use transwell assay to perform invasion test on overexpressing cells, expecting to obtain migrated cell counts.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Overexpression of USP41 increased invasion.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Migration and invasion are enhanced. [Gap] Effect on proliferation needs quantification. [Decision] To achieve proliferation quantification, chose to use cell counting to perform direct cell number measurement on overexpressing cells, expecting to obtain cell growth rates.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Cell growth of breast cancer cells was improved by overexpression of USP41.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] USP41 affects cell phenotype. [Gap] Molecular mechanism regarding EMT markers is unknown. [Decision] To achieve mechanism elucidation, chose to use Western Blotting to perform protein expression analysis of EMT markers, expecting to obtain Snail, E-cadherin, Vimentin levels.

parameters.antibodies: Anti-USP41, Anti-Snail, Anti-E-cadherin, Anti-Vimentin, Anti-Slug, Anti-Actin
parameters.detection: Immobilon Western chemiluminescent HRP substrate, iBright Imager

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Depletion of USP41 downregulated Snail protein expression, but not E-cadherin, Vimentin, and Slug. Overexpression upregulated Snail.

references.citation: Ji, J., et al. Thorac. Cancer 2021
references.relevance: Previous report on USP41 and E-cadherin in lung adenocarcinoma, providing context for EMT marker analysis.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Snail protein is downregulated by USP41 depletion. [Gap] Whether this is transcriptional or post-translational is unknown. [Decision] To achieve regulation level determination, chose to use Thermal Cycler Dice to perform qPCR analysis of Snail mRNA, expecting to obtain Snail mRNA levels.

parameters.primers: Snail (forward) 5'-TTT CTG GTT CTG TGT CCT CTG CCT-3', (reverse) 5'-TGA GTC TGT CAG CCT TTG TCC TGT-3'

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Snail mRNA expression was not altered by knockdown of USP41.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Snail regulation is post-translational. [Gap] Protein stability mechanism is unverified. [Decision] To achieve stability assessment, chose to use Cycloheximide to perform protein synthesis inhibition chase assay, expecting to obtain Snail degradation rates.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Treatment with CHX in USP41-depleted cells accelerated the degradation of Snail protein from 1h.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Snail degradation is accelerated. [Gap] Ubiquitination involvement is unconfirmed. [Decision] To achieve ubiquitination assessment, chose to use MG132 to perform proteasome inhibition assay, expecting to observe Snail accumulation/ubiquitination.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: MG132 inhibited USP41 siRNA-induced Snail downregulation.

references.citation: Zhou, B.P., et al. Nat. Cell Biol. 2004
references.relevance: Establishes Snail degradation by ubiquitin proteasome system.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Proteasome is involved. [Gap] Direct ubiquitination of Snail by USP41 is unverified. [Decision] To achieve ubiquitination verification, chose to use Immunoprecipitation to perform ubiquitination assay with HA-UB plasmid, expecting to obtain Snail ubiquitination levels.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: USP41 downregulation increased the ubiquitination of Snail, whereas overexpression decreased Snail ubiquitination.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] USP41 affects Snail ubiquitination. [Gap] Physical interaction is unconfirmed. [Decision] To achieve interaction verification, chose to use Immunoprecipitation to perform Co-IP assay using Snail antibody, expecting to obtain USP41-Snail complex.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Snail interacts with USP41 in both breast cancer cells.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Interaction is confirmed. [Gap] Catalytic activity requirement is unverified. [Decision] To achieve catalytic role verification, chose to use Lipidofect-P to perform transfection of USP41 mutant (C422A), expecting to compare stabilization ability with wild-type.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: USP41 wild-type stabilized Snail protein, whereas USP41 mutant did not compared to vector-transfected cells.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Catalytic activity is required. [Gap] Role of E3 ligase TRIM21 in this pathway is unknown. [Decision] To achieve E3 ligase involvement assessment, chose to use Lipofectamine RNAiMAX Reagent to perform TRIM21 siRNA transfection, expecting to observe Snail rescue.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Knockdown of TRIM21 markedly rescued Snail downregulation by USP41 siRNA.

references.citation: Jin, Y., et al. Int. J. Biol. Macromol. 2019
references.relevance: Identifies TRIM21 as a key E3 ligase in ubiquitination and degradation of Snail.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] USP41 stabilizes Snail. [Gap] Whether Snail mediates USP41 effects on migration is unverified. [Decision] To achieve functional mediation verification, chose to use Lipidofect-P to perform co-transfection of USP41 siRNA and Snail plasmid, expecting to observe migration rescue.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Upregulation of Snail improved the decrease in cancer cell migration by USP41 knockdown.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Snail rescues migration. [Gap] Effect on proliferation needs verification. [Decision] To achieve proliferation mediation verification, chose to use Cell counting to perform growth measurement on co-transfected cells, expecting to observe proliferation rescue.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Ectopic expression of Snail inhibited the decrease in proliferation by USP41 siRNA.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Mechanism is elucidated in cell lines. [Gap] Clinical correlation between USP41 and Snail is unknown. [Decision] To achieve clinical relevance verification, chose to use TCGA database to perform correlation analysis, expecting to obtain expression correlation.

parameters.analysis: Correlation between USP41 and Snail mRNA expression

02_agent_trajectory.observation: USP41 and Snail expression showed positive correlation.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] All experimental data is collected. [Gap] Statistical significance needs confirmation. [Decision] To achieve data validation, chose to use SPSS to perform statistical analysis, expecting to obtain p-values.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Statistical significance determined (e.g., *p<0.05).

03_success_verification.validation_technique: Western Blotting, Migration Assays (Wound healing, Transwell), TCGA Database Analysis, qPCR, Immunoprecipitation

USP41_expression_p_value.interpretation: Significant overexpression of USP41 in tumor tissues compared to normal.

migration_inhibition.interpretation: Significant suppression of migration upon USP41 knockdown.

survival_correlation.interpretation: High USP41 expression correlates with poor prognosis.

03_success_verification.final_verdict: The research objective was achieved. USP41 was confirmed to enhance EMT and migration of breast cancer cells through Snail stabilization via deubiquitination. Quantifiable goals regarding Snail stabilization levels and cell migration/growth rates were met with statistical significance.
